title: VeloraOS 1.7.0 — GPU Diagnostics & Complete Chat
releaseNotes: Added live GPU, PCI, VM passthrough, CUDA, ROCm, Vulkan, RAM, VRAM and Ollama diagnostics.
Added an administrator-only acceleration test and loaded-model CPU/GPU usage reporting.
Completed Chat with copy, edit and resend, regenerate, rename, search, Markdown/JSON export, tables and syntax highlighting.
Added per-response token, speed and duration statistics while preserving all existing user data, licensing and models.
